description: 93 - 25-02-2025 _- Emails between Jonathan Reynolds (former Secretary of State for Business
text:
and_ Trade), Michael _Ellam (Second Permanent Secreta!

Economic Affairs, CO) and others

European _Union_and_International

From: Michael Ellam < Personal >
Sent: Tue 25/02/2025 7:20:34 PM (UTC)
To: "Kalada BRUCE-JAJAPERSONAL
6c JCS , Ailsa Terry
< Personal >, Jessica Philips < Personal >, JCS
"Kate JOSEPH (DBT)"
< Personal >, "Black, Jonathan - CO (OFF-SEN)"
< Personal >, Jcs
JCS
Varun Chandra < Personal >, "Gareth
DAVIES (DBT)" < Personal >,
Personal , langinsberg Personal
Subject: Re: OFFSEN Lutnick/SoS readout

Will arrange for 8.30pm for whoever from copy is available.

Ailsa - as discussed, the purpose is to take stock whether there are any immediate implications
for the PM's visit rather than any more fundamental implications for our approach for the period

beyond that.

On Tue, 25 Feb 2025 at 19:14, Kalada BRUCE-JAJAPERSO

> wrote:

Hi Ailsa,

8pm works for me. For JCS _ it will be 1:30am local, so will spare her.

Adding Kate, and Gareth for info.
Kal

Kalada Bruce-Jaja | Principal Private Secretary

Department for Business and Trade | Tel: Personal
mail: Personal
From: JCS

Date: Tuesday, 25 February 2025 at 19:10

To: Ailsa Terry < Personal

< Personal

Chandra <

Subject: RE: OFFSEN Lutnick/SoS readout
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Hi Kal, 
,
I think we need a call tonight about what to do next following this call, 
 
Would this work for you? Copying @Michael Ellam who could convene us this 
evening – after 2000 UK time?
Peter M should join too and HMT.  Also copying our comms lead and DoC tba, and 
Varun C here.
Ailsa
Ailsa Terry CMG| Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs| Prime Minister’s 
Office | 10 Downing Street, London, SW1A 2AA | 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Subject: OFFSEN Lutnick/SoS readout
All,
Many thanks for the quick work on the briefing for the SoS/Lutnick call today. See 
readout attached – we’re currently 5.5h ahead so apologies to anyone I’ve forgotten 
to copy, please do circulate within reason.
A couple of next steps:
• HMA and SoS had a quick de-brief after the meeting.
Many thanks
Senior Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for 
Business and Trade  
Department for Business and Trade | Old Admiralty Building, 
London, SW1A 2DY
